meanings.definition: an instance of rapid strong pulsation (of the heart)
examples: he felt a throbbing in his head

meanings.definition: the act of pounding (delivering repeated heavy blows)
examples: the sudden hammer of fists caught him off guard
the pounding of feet on the hallway

meanings.definition: hit hard with the hand, fist, or some heavy instrument
examples: the salesman pounded the door knocker

meanings.definition: strike or drive against with a heavy impact
examples: ram the gate with a sledgehammer
The heavy man lumbered across the room
The locks pound the water of the canal

meanings.definition: shut up or confine in any enclosure or within any bounds or limits
place or shut up in a pound
examples: pound the cows so they don't stray

meanings.definition: break down and crush by beating, as with a pestle
examples: pound the roots with a heavy flat stone
